name: DNC Voting Info
subject: VIRGINIA: Go vote today
body:
Today is Election Day.
---
This is it! Polls are open, and it's time to vote in Virginia.

**Confirm your polling place now, then forward this message to your friends and neighbors so they can go vote, too:**

**[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE
](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc44/4067b0a/2b30992c6/7e69a7f9/2202700099/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/I-Will-Vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+FIND+YOUR+POLLING+PLACE&utm_campaign=em_20170613_dnc_va&source=em_20170613_dnc_va")**
Already cast your ballot? Thanks for being a voter! Make sure every Democrat you know in Virginia knows they can find their polling place at **[IWillVote.com.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc44/4067b0a/2b30992c6/7e69a786/2202700099/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/I-Will-Vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IWillVotecom&utm_campaign=em_20170613_dnc_va&source=em_20170613_dnc_va")**

Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc44/4067b0a/2b30992c6/7e69a787/2202700099/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170613_dnc_va&source=em_20170613_dnc_va"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc44/4067b0a/2b30992c6/7e69a784/2202700099/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170613_dnc_va&source=em_20170613_dnc_va"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc44/4067b0a/2b30992c6/7e69a785/2202700099/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170613_dnc_va&source=em_20170613_dnc_va") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cc44/4067b0a/2b30992c6/7e69a782/2202700099/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170613_dnc_va&source=em_20170613_dnc_va"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: I ask for your vote today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,
Today is Virginia's Republican primary. Voting will take place at your regular polling location between 6AM and 7PM. You may [find your polling place online](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z4I0ullyTCpj9cB4PY_8TrR87nWMwLj8NcXVOcZaSiLTPIJI5-ZsLW0NXljlI1L6cjRKHO5Bl8Me2h4BRtkV-oEN95-3Wc12VMAOw6dSxT5WS2Q29eG3CtvVcn8iXmYoVmzUGpbmxqeeLHZ1KMPuLlX1k9-ueg-lLqUeotf5yQAWKJqlzDbJbA1Itx3h-QQy3HiDnvPL6EXJ0Tl-9lJt8A==&c=quoPd4H8cAbw3aLF6i4ZgUFvTZ2NYYJ9xAo3W80shpZyJIaPCNZa0w==&ch=1uA_p2Khay8fntOhAMr2Kt0Yh-18VlAd60AEW9RRMQ20hs58L1UZkw==) if you are unsure where to vote. Please do not forget to bring your ID.
I humbly ask for your vote in the race for Lieutenant Governor.
Last year, I announced my candidacy because I truly believe Virginia needs new leadership in Richmond. Virginia used to be the best state to do business; now we are 13th. Our economic growth ranks in the bottom ten states nationwide. Too many conservative priorities have gone unfulfilled over the last four years.
I would be honored to be a part of Virginia's comeback team.
If you want to know what someone will do, look first to what they have done before.
In Virginia's Senate, I am proud to have led the fight against the Obamacare mandate in Virginia. I have maintained an A+ rating with the NRA, stood up against illegal immigration, defended life, supported law enforcement, strengthened ethics in public service, and worked to address our education and transportation needs.
In my professional career, one of my proudest accomplishments was defending conservative groups against targeting by Obama's IRS. We won that fight.

I am truly grateful to have worked with our Republican majority to keep spending under control and advance pro-jobs legislation to grow Virginia's economy.
Now is the time to boldly do more.
I ask for your vote in today's Republican primary because I believe as you do that, with the right policies, Virginia's best days lie ahead of us. With bold Republican leadership, we can put Virginia back on the right course and leave to our children a stronger and more prosperous Commonwealth than our parents handed down to us.
I also ask for your vote because I look forward to being a strong running mate who can help our gubernatorial nominee win in November. If you give me your trust and confidence, I will work tirelessly with our entire ticket to turn Virginia red this November and work to increase our margins all across the Commonwealth.
More than anything, I ask for the opportunity to lead, to serve, and to work for you.
Virginia's political traditions run deep, stretching all the way back to before the founding of our nation. Virginia has been home to some of our nation's greatest leaders and to some of the most brilliant and enlightened thinkers in human history. It is because of their vision and sacrifices that we exercise our right to vote today.
These are large shoes to fill.
If I am honored to receive your support, you have my promise to fight on behalf of all Virginians who know we can do better, who know we can create jobs, grow our economy, and expand opportunity and individual liberty for everyone who calls Virginia home.
I hope I can earn your support today.
Sincerely,

---
|
---
| Jill Vogel
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

---

Today, President Trump, Secretary Acosta, and Assistant to the President, Ivanka Trump, will travel to Wisconsin to tour several training classrooms and participate in a roundtable discussion with local business owners.

body:
There's still time to sign the President's birthday card... |

Peter,

Did you see this note from the First Lady?

Next week, we'll be presenting President Trump his official birthday card signed by millions of Americans just like you.

And Peter, we wanted to be sure you didn't miss the chance to join us in our celebrations.

[**So if you haven 't already, be sure to sign your name to the President's official birthday card before 9:00 PM on Wednesday, June 14.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/ayhvtzkcpwbnhzhznygyknrksrncssygvdhydmrmdyhlyp_glycllnttwr_bgqbczld.html?a=1247&b=87920&c=17786605)

Thank you,

Team TRUMP

P.S. - This is President Trump's first birthday in the White House working for the American people and we want to make sure it's one he'll never forget. **[Sign the official card today!](http://click1.action.gop.com/ethvzlschkdfblblftwtsfjspjfcpptwvybtyrjrytbqtz_glycllnttwr_hcwmhfqn.html?a=1247&b=87920&c=17786605)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I've never seen anything like this, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senate Republicans are going to try to repeal the Affordable Care Act by the end of the month.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170613-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

I learned some scary news last week: the Senate Republicans are going to try to repeal the Affordable Care Act by the end of the month.

And here's the terrifying part: They seem to think they have the votes in the Senate to do it.

I'm not crying wolf here. I'm really worried. Health care for millions of Americans is on the line in the next few weeks. The Republicans are counting on the fact that so many terrible things are happening right now -- and that everyone thinks Trumpcare is dead -- that they can slip this through before we have a chance to get organized.

**[Chip in $1 now to send a message to Republicans: We will NOT let you repeal health care for 23 million Americans.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170613-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Majority Leader Mitch McConnell came out of the Republican caucus launch last week happy as a clam about their health care bill. Then, while everyone was focused on FBI Director Comey's written testimony, they quietly filed "Rule 14" so that the health care bill can skip all hearings and committee votes. That means Republicans could pass this thing as early as this week.

If you're confused and wondering "what will the Senate Republicans pass?" \-- don't worry, you're not alone. I haven't seen the Senate Republicans' health care plan. None of my Democratic colleagues have either. We have no idea what sort of giveaways they may be promising undecided Republicans to secure their votes.

Senate Republicans have done all their deal-making behind closed doors, and we think the Republicans will only give us hours to look at their bill. Only a few hours to see all of the ways that they will gut health care for seniors, for veterans, for children, for people with disabilities -- for working people across this country.

I've never seen anything like this. I've never seen anything close to this. No hearings, no debate, no bill to look at. This scheme to repeal health care takes every norm of the Senate -- every concept of how we work together -- and just burns them to the ground.

[**We need to fight back -- and fight back hard. Chip in $1 right now to show Republicans: We won 't let you repeal Americans' health care.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170613-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Team, we need you to share your story (again). We need you to light up the phone lines (again). We need you to talk to your FOX News-loving brother or uncle about why we need Medicaid, veterans' care, and money to fight the opioid epidemic (again, or for the first time).

The fight for the Affordable Care Act is back -- and it's time to fight.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**[DONATE](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170613-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. Make no mistake, everyone -- Donald Trump and Betsy DeVos's plan to cut $9.2 BILLION from public education is extremely alarming.
DeVos is planning to funnel money away from public schools toward unaccountable private and charter schools -- all to line the pockets of corporate special interests.
Students, teachers, and hard-working families could suffer at the hand of DeVos's budget cuts. Funding for vocational programs that help people find jobs, teacher training, afterschool programs, and more could go out the window.
[**Please, add your name now to make sure Washington Republicans know that if they vote for these devastating cuts to education, we 'll vote them out of office.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde88/2a380d31/1b6f1765/fe9802/810745027/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201706_DeVosBudget?source=e20170613_devos_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Every student deserves to be set up for success. But this budget isn't about doing what's best for our kids. It's about Betsy DeVos's corporate agenda to gut funding for public schools.
The only way to prevent this budget from passing and stop this threat to public education is to make our voices heard loud and clear.
[**Sign our grassroots petition now to let Donald Trump, Betsy DeVos, and any Washington Republican who supports this budget know that we won 't stand for their reckless attempts to undermine public education.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde88/2a380d31/1b6f1765/fe9802/810745027/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/201706_DeVosBudget?source=e20170613_devos_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")

body:
What they're doing is dangerous to our republic. |

Peter,

If you told me this would happen in America, I wouldn't believe you...
* The losing political party is using a conspiracy theory -- without having a single shred of evidence -- to _DERAIL_ a constitutionally-elected president
* Our former FBI director cowardly used a friend to leak a government memo to the media as a political weapon, joining countless other unelected bureaucrats who leak
* The Obama administration called for the UNMASKING of members of my campaign during the transition of power
* The fake news media peddle conspiracy theories and lies about our administration

So when I say there is an effort to SABOTAGE us, I mean it. This is a threat to our republic -- and __we can 't let them win.__

**We MUST keep fighting. We MUST be 100 percent prepared for the vicious attacks that will NEVER end. WITCH-HUNT!**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is NOT the WA I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Washington cannot be the kind of state that allows this kind of blatant discrimination.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTEyNTE2OTcS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MTE0OTUzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Dear Friend, I know Washington as an inclusive, fair, and equal state. And we're proud of that. But today some people are threatening our values. A new initiative, I-1552, would repeal an 11-year-old non-discrimination law that has ensured fair and equal treatment for everyone. This initiative would repeal protections for our transgender friends, neighbors, and loved ones -- meaning they could be discriminated against with no repercussions. We cannot allow this to happen. And right now there is still time to stop it. As you read this, the group leading this effort is collecting signatures across Washington to put this horrible repeal on the ballot. You and I need to make sure this does not get the signatures it needs to be put to a vote -- join me in refusing to sign this petition. [**Will you stand with me and decline to sign this damaging petition that would roll back our non-discrimination laws and hurt our transgender loved ones and neighbors?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTEyNTE2OTcS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MTE0OTUzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0) We have seen what happened in places like North Carolina and Indiana when they passed regressive policies like this one. Their economies were hurt. They were boycotted by companies and groups across the nation. We cannot allow that to happen here. Washington's biggest industries are standing against this policy -- because they know it hurts people and the economy alike. There is no reason for this other than prejudice and fear. It is spurred on by the same damaging ideology that prompted the Trump administration to take away protections from trans students earlier this year. But I know one thing: Washington will not bow to this wave of hatred that the Trump administration is attempting to spread. Washington is better than this. Washington welcomes everyone. That's why we need to stop this policy in its tracks. Decline to sign today. Thank you. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=11251697&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTE4MTE0OTUzOQS2&l=6318472&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
